query:
-- Step 1: Remove any existing duplicate rows, keeping the most recent
DELETE d1 FROM deals d1
INNER JOIN deals d2 
WHERE d1.id < d2.id 
  AND d1.name = d2.name 
  AND d1.source = d2.source;

-- Step 2: Add the unique constraint
ALTER TABLE deals ADD UNIQUE KEY uq_deals_name_source (name, source);
